⚡ Hiring: MSD 365 AI Developer – Dynamics Contact Center Solutions

We are looking for an experienced MSD 365 AI Developer with strong hands-on expertise in Dynamics Contact Center solutions, AI/ML, and conversational AI.

• Microsoft Dynamics Contact Center
• Copilot Studio
• Azure AI Services
• Python
• NLP
• TensorFlow / PyTorch

• Experience deploying AI models on Azure

• Ability to work independently in an EST-aligned setup

• ITIL / ITSM understanding

Senior Talent Acquisition at Esquare

Hi All!!!

We are #hiring

#FullStack #FullStackEngineer #Reactjs #Nextjs #React #Next #Python #FastAPI

Role: Full-Stack AI Engineer
Location: Remote / India
Duration: 6+ Months Contract
Work mode :- EST Shift
 
Overview:
We are looking for a strong Full-Stack AI Engineer who can work across frontend, backend, and AI systems to build a next-generation web platform focused on media intelligence and machine learning.

Responsibilities:
Build frontend using React, Next.js, Tailwind (TailAdmin)
Develop backend APIs using Python (FastAPI)
Design and manage PostgreSQL / Supabase databases
Integrate and deploy ML models into production
Build systems for:
Image, audio, video watermarking and fingerprinting
Embedding generation and similarity scoring
Implement vector search systems
Integrate with external APIs (LinkedIn, Instagram, etc.)
Ensure performance, scalability, and security of the system
Requirements:
Strong experience in:
React / Next.js
Python / FastAPI
Experience integrating ML models into real applications
Solid understanding of system architecture and APIs
Experience working with databases and vector search

Interested, please share your cv to swetha@esquareinfo.com

Hiring for contractual position of Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents) 3-5 Years 
Location Remote 
Pls share 9667627371
Follow for more position Nidhi Rajput

Senior AI Engineer (LLM / RAG / Agents)
📍 Remote | Contract
🕒 4 Hours EST Overlap
👨‍💻 Experience: 2–4 Years
Job Summary:
We are looking for a hands-on AI Engineer to build scalable, production-ready AI systems using LLMs, RAG pipelines, and agent-based architectures. The role involves designing intelligent workflows, optimizing performance, and ensuring reliability, observability, and cost efficiency.
Key Responsibilities:
Build and optimize LLM-based agents (planner, router, intent systems)
Develop RAG pipelines with embeddings, retrieval & reranking
Tune prompts, routing logic, and model performance
Implement evaluation metrics (accuracy, latency, quality)
Ensure observability (logs, traces, cost tracking)
Maintain secure, scalable APIs and CI/CD pipelines
Required Skills:
Strong experience with LLMs, RAG, and AI systems
Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, etc.)
Proficiency in Python or Node.js
Experience with APIs, system design, and backend development
Understanding of observability, security, and performance optimization
Good to Have:
Knowledge graphs, OpenTelemetry, Kubernetes
A/B testing, evaluation frameworks, and cost optimization
If you want, I can make an even shorter 2–3 line WhatsApp/LinkedIn version for quick hiring posts.
